shots.title: image1 into image2
shots.camera: Continuous first-person or observational camera movement that begins in image1.jpg and naturally settles into image2.jpg, with enough overlap to support a soft handoff to the next adjacent-pair shot.
shots.action: Carry visual momentum from the mood and details of image1.jpg into the environment of image2.jpg, using plausible movement and continuity anchors rather than abrupt transformation.
shots.transition_goal: Resolve cleanly from image1.jpg to image2.jpg so the edit can continue without a hard-feeling cut.
shots.voiceover_line: Move from quiet and focused into neutral, subdued without breaking continuity.
